function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap steps (tree, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rule, read nested 40_projects/AGENTS.MD before entering project folder, and used project README.MD as canonical record. Folder date prefix supplies canonical project start date.
function.outcome_justification: The informal name 'home automation cleanup' most closely matches the canonical project record in 40_projects/2026_03_04_house_mesh/README.MD, which describes a home systems project focused on dependable local-first household infrastructure. The folder prefix 2026_03_04 is the canonical start date. I also checked 40_projects/2026_03_04_hearthline/README.MD to rule out the other home-related candidate; it is about household coordination rather than automation infrastructure.
